## Recommended Fix Order

**Phase 1: Auto-Fix Lint Issues (HIGH PRIORITY)**
1. Remove unused variable declarations from test file
2. Fix import ordering (group ordering, blank lines)

**Phase 3: Quality Verification (EXIT CRITERIA)**

3. Build: `pnpm build` (should pass)
